problem_title: Compliance operations slow without unified control
problem_description: Executives and risk leaders face higher operational costs and weaker oversight when compliance workflows remain siloed across multiple disconnected providers. This fragmentation slows onboarding, complicates audit readiness and obscures clear visibility into risk and decision history.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies provider outputs, decision logs, case workflows and audit evidence into a single operating layer that delivers executives clear visibility into risk, controls and compliance activity.
workflow_title: From provider results to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY organizes provider outputs through rules, risk reviews, case workflows, decisions and evidence to support clearer compliance operations and audit readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another compliance silo. One executive control layer

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives with a connected operational view to reduce compliance risk, improve auditability, support bank due diligence, and enhance decision visibility across digital asset compliance workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY improve compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures fragmented provider outputs into connected workflows, cases, and regulatory rule updates, reducing manual tasks while maintaining control and transparency in compliance operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs, supporting evidence, and rule change records to support teams maintain audit-ready evidence for regulatory, internal, and bank reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening providers, layering compliance workflows above them without disrupting current systems or processes.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No, SFTY sits above providers and does not replace them; it organizes their outputs into structured reviews, decisions, cases, evidence, and reports for better operational control.
final_title: Bring compliance workflows into one operational view
final_description: Review how SFTY supports risk control, audit-ready evidence and bank due diligence for VASP compliance teams and executives.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
